abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Beacon of Order
abilities.text: After a model within 8" declares a trigger, this model may remove an Adaptable token from itself. If it does so, the trigger's declaration is canceled.

abilities.name: "No"
abilities.text: After an enemy attack deals damage to this model, this model may drain two (soulstone) to end the attacker's activation.

actions.name: Die Thou, Unsung
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose one of the target's non-(c) attack actions. This action's Dmg is equal to the Dmg of the chosen action.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

actions.name: Wave of Power
actions.effects: If the target has Wp 5 or less, it gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Magic Made Real
triggers.text: Summon a Soulstone Gamin into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Absolute Control
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. Ally only. Target gains an Adaptable token then declares an action.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".
